title: December Daily + a CAMEO Giveaway! (CLOSED)
excerpt: Alright, so one of my favorite parts of the December Daily album is putting together the cover. You can see 2010 here and 2011 here . Another favorite part is decorating the insides and then having the books completed (thru…
body:
Alright, so one of my favorite parts of the December Daily album is putting together the cover. You can see 2010 here and 2011 here. Another favorite part is decorating the insides and then having the books completed (thru the 25th) to look at for years to come. This year I am using the Studio Calico kit (which is sold out), and I will be elaborating more on the process in the 25 Days class (you have until Nov 30th to sign up) as well as showing progress photos here on the blog.In between other work, I got excited about getting something on the cover, so I stuck a piece of washi tape along the bottom. Then resumed the other work.

A couple days later I carved out an hour, determined to finish the cover. Sadly, the washi tape was not sticking to the fabric, so I just peeled it off and started from scratch. It was a bit deflating, so I decided to work on the inside instead. I stamped Ann-Marie's "Sending You JOY This Season" on the inner cover and felt a rather ridiculous amount of happiness. It sounds silly, but sometimes you just have to dive into it by taking a really small step. Then I cut a few of Ali Edwards' designs exclusive to the 25 Days class.

Since I can't seem to work in a tidy, neat space, I spread out a bunch of items from the kit and my collection and went to town.

Supplies: Hey There stamp set || Ali Edwards Technique Tuesday stamp set || Scrapperin stamp set || Pamela Garrison stamps || Hearts by Sweet Stamp At some point along the way, I decided to only use stamps + Black Staz On for my cover. Digging the simplicity of it and plan on adding a lot more color and bling and all sorts of things on the inner pages.

Now for the really fun part! Silhouette wants to give one of you - my dear readers - a Silhouette Cameo valued at $299!

To enter: 1. Follow Silhouette America on Pinterest. 2. Come back here and leave me a comment about something you are thankful for. Giveaway is closed. Winner is #225 - Eden Petersen. Congrats! 

(will close on Friday, November 23rd at 5am and a random winner will be selected and announced here shortly after. For those who didn't win, a discount code for Black Friday will also be given at that time! Good luck everyone!)
